message:
security: mask agent token + validate proxy subPath (Copilot review #10363) (#10368)

- Stop echoing KC_AGENT_TOKEN value to stdout in startup-oauth.sh
- Add allowlist validation to kc-agent proxy handler subPath parameter

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -346,7 +346,7 @@ fi
 # via a backend-proxied token endpoint.
 if [ -z "$KC_AGENT_TOKEN" ]; then
     KC_AGENT_TOKEN="$(openssl rand -hex 32)"
-    echo "Auto-generated KC_AGENT_TOKEN: $KC_AGENT_TOKEN"
+    echo "Auto-generated KC_AGENT_TOKEN."
 fi
 export KC_AGENT_TOKEN
